videos.title: Iranian Revolutionary Guard fires at oil tanker... Mojtaba sends strong message (April 18, 2026 /...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Iranian Revolutionary Guard fired at a civilian oil tanker attempting to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. The attack was reported by the UK Maritime Trade Operations. Fortunately, the crew members were not injured.
2. Iran's supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, issued a strong message through his Telegram channel, stating that this navy is preparing to inflict a new and crushing defeat on their enemies.
3. Our correspondent is currently stationed near the Strait of Hormuz in the Arab Emirate of Abu Dhabi. Many ships are anchored in the bay, some of which have been unable to escape the strait due to Iranian control and are experiencing confusion as a result. Ships attempting to leave via the Larak Island route can be seen zigzagging, indicating they may need to turn back.

videos.title: [현장연결] “이란혁명수비대, 유조선에 사격”…우리 선박은? 이 시각 오만 [9시 뉴스] / KBS  2026.04.18.
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 호르무즈 해협이 막히면서 현장의 선박들이 가장 혼란스러운 상황일 것으로 예상된다. 일부 선박은 이ран 라라크 섬에서 해협을 빠져나갔고, 유조선 토린호와 LPG 운반선 가디언 호 등이 그중 있다.
2. 일부 선박들은 라크섬 인근에서 방향을 돌리며 해협을 빠져나오려고 하지만 실패했다. 또한, 이ран 혁명수비대가 유조선에 발포를 했다는 보도가 있었으며, 일부 선박들은 제봉세로 통과가 불가능하다는 무전통보를 받았다고 알려졌다.
3. 현재 우리나라의 선박은 26척이 있으며, 해협 재개방 소식이 있었을 때 한 선박이 카타르 도아에서 출발하여 해협 통과를 시도했다고 알려졌다. 그러나, 다시 봉쇄되면서 상황은 알 수 없게 됐다.

videos.title: "조만간 7만 전자, 40만 닉스로 돌아간다" 삼성전자·SK하이닉스 경고 신호 보내는 중, 모두가 시장을 잘못 읽고 있다 [2026 반도체주 전망] | 이주완 애널리스트 (통합본)
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix have achieved record-breaking results, but the market is misinterpreting this as a supercycle in the semiconductor industry due to geopolitical factors like the Iran War and the Horn of Africa blockade. However, the actual impact on the global stock market is expected to be minimal because the semiconductor industry itself will not be significantly affected.
2. The analyst predicts that the supercycle in the semiconductor industry will continue despite these geopolitical factors. This is due to the high demand for memory, but this demand increase is not as significant as it seems. The price increase and profits for companies are more related to supply issues rather than actual demand.
3. The analyst argues that the supercycle in the semiconductor industry is a myth, as demand has no significant impact on the cycle. Price fluctuations are primarily due to supply issues, not demand.
